message:
feat(layout): cache-oblivious van Emde Boas tree layout for widget traversal (bd-xwkon)

Implement VebTree<T> that flattens a logical tree into contiguous memory
using the recursive van Emde Boas layout, ensuring O(log_B(n)) cache
misses per root-to-leaf traversal for any cache line size B.

API: VebTree::build(nodes), get(id), get_by_index(idx), iter() for
vEB-order traversal, iter_dfs() for logical DFS, root(), as_slice().

14 unit tests: empty/single/multi-node trees, parent-child consistency,
depth correctness, ID lookup, DFS completeness, 1000-node chains,
wide trees, rebuild determinism.

9 property tests: node count conservation, ID uniqueness, root-first
invariant, parent-child bidirectional consistency, depth correctness,
DFS completeness, lookup correctness, determinism, binary tree shape.

Benchmarks: build, traverse (vEB vs DFS), and lookup at 127/1023/16383
node binary trees and 100/1000/5000 node wide trees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
